content: We can frame the intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) from curiosity-driven agent reinforcement learning as a built-in active selection mechanism for state-of-the-art 2024-2025 agent memory systems, where only memory traces that trigger sustained prediction error are retained and prioritized for fine-tuning in future task contexts. This turns passive memory storage into an actively curated, self-organizing knowledge bank that grows with the agent’s own exploratory goals, rather than relying on external labeled data to prioritize what to remember.
